title: Share a File in Chat
description: Share a file with someone through Teams chat

steps.action: Click the Chat icon on the left sidebar
Open the chat with the person you want to share with
Click the attach/paperclip icon below the message input
Select 'Upload from my computer' from the menu
Select the file from the file picker dialog
Click 'Open' or 'Send' to share the file

expectedResult: File is shared in the chat
